documentation.content:
A stuff-to-do Cloud Run Job run reported one or more sync errors (scraper failures, or Calendar insert/delete failures). To see details:

```
gcloud logging read 'resource.type="cloud_run_job" AND resource.labels.job_name="stuff-to-do" AND jsonPayload.event_type="sync_result" AND jsonPayload.action="errors" AND jsonPayload.count>0' --project PROJECT_ID_PLACEHOLDER --freshness=1d --limit 50
```

For the underlying exception messages, drop the `jsonPayload` filters and search `severity>=ERROR` over the same time window and job name.
